source: CSIS - Center for Strategic and International Studies

news.title: China’s Solar Industry Is in Upheaval—The Effects Will Be Global
news.author:
Michael Davidson 
and 
              Sandy Qian, Michael Davidson, Sandy Qian
news.summary_en: Rather than opening space for rivals, China’s solar industry shakeout is forging a more resilient core — embedding deeper into global value chains, securing a technological lead, and reshaping the industry’s future trajectory to its own long-term advantage.
